name: MuseLuxe Air Dry Clay - 32 Colors Modeling Clay Kit with 3 Sculpting Tools,Safe & Non-Toxic,DIY Magic Gifts Toys for Boys,Girls,Kids
bullets: VIBRANT CLAY KIT - Our air dry clay kit includes 32 different colors,3 sculpting tools,and extra sealing bags.You can also mix and match any way you like to create your desired colors

SAFE AND CONVENIENT MODELING CLAY - Our air dry modeling clay is made from 100% safe,high-quality materials.It's non-toxic, odorless,and non-sticky.It dries completely within 24 hours without the need for baking

MAGIC CLAY FOR KIDS - Our Ultra-lightweight magic clay is soft,maintaining its color and offering exceptional flexibility.It’s easy to shape,making it perfect for modeling and sculpting projects.Once you finish your creation,just let it air dry,If you're not satisfied,you can store it in the provided sealed bag to keep it moist for your next round of sculpting
IMAGINATION AND VERSATILITY - Start with simple shapes and use bright colors to engage children's senses, enhance their hand-eye coordination, and help them develop fine motor skills
PERFECT GIFTS IDEA - Suitable for birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, home decor, school or family crafting time, and any occasion.Great gifts for Age 3 4 5 6 7 8+ Years Old
